extName.message: AI Timeline: Double Your AI Efficiency | GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen

extDescription.message: Supports GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek & all major AI platforms: LaTeX copy, interactive timeline, prompt library, code runner.

wjxnkp.message:
Are you sure you want to delete folder "{folderName}"?

This folder and its subfolders contain {count} starred items. These items will be moved to the default folder after deletion.

qzmvkx.message: Are you sure you want to delete folder "{folderName}"?

mzkvxp.message: When enabled, an interactive timeline will be displayed on the right side of the AI conversation page.

vkpmzx.message: Use ↑ / ↓ keys to navigate conversation nodes

xpvmkz.message: When enabled, use ↑ / ↓ keys to quickly jump between conversation nodes.

kzxvpm.message: Long press on a conversation node in the timeline to mark it as important.

vxkpzm.message: When enabled, formulas on the page are automatically detected. Click to copy in LaTeX format.

vxmkpz.message: Enter key: Single press for new line, double press to send

mkpxvz.message: When enabled, press Enter once for a new line in the AI chat input box; press Enter twice quickly to send the message.

qoytxz.message: This feature is enabled by default and cannot be turned off

hobsidbg.message: When enabled, a prompt button will be displayed on the left side of the input box

dcnfmq.message: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?

runnerHint.message: Enter your code here, async/await supported

runnerSettingsHint.message: When enabled, a Run button will appear on code blocks to execute code directly

qdyqxsc.message: Are you sure you want to unstar?

formulaLatexHint.message: Click on a formula to copy it in LaTeX format

formulaMathMLHint.message: Click on a formula to copy it in MathML format, paste directly into Word

exportHint.message: Manually back up or restore data via JSON file for migration to other browsers.

importHint.message: Import data from a JSON file, supports overwrite or merge modes.

importModeMergeDesc.message: Keep existing data and merge with imported data

importModeOverwriteDesc.message: Clear existing data and replace with imported data

importSuccessHint.message: Data imported successfully. Please refresh the page to apply changes.

quoteReplyHint.message: After selecting text on the page, a follow-up button appears to quickly quote into the input box

scrollToBottomHint.message: Show a quick button to scroll to the latest message

pleaseWait.message: Please wait, node ID is loading...

chatTimeLabelHint.message: Display send time on each message, as clear as a chat log

gdriveHint.message: Back up data to your Google Drive for multi-device sync.

mermaidSettingsHint.message: Automatically render Mermaid code blocks as interactive diagrams

mermaidViewerHint.message: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan · ESC to close

notepadToggleHint.message: Show notepad entry at the bottom of the timeline for quick notes

notepadPlaceholder.message: Just write what comes to mind…

notepadConfirmDeleteContent.message: This cannot be undone. Are you sure?

aboutPluginContent.message: A productivity plugin built for AI conversations, featuring conversation timeline, quick notes, LaTeX formula copying, custom prompts, and more. Works with ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Kimi, Claude, and all major platforms — designed to double your AI efficiency.

aboutDataSecurityContent.message: All your data within this extension is stored locally in your browser or in your Google Drive, without passing through any third-party servers. The extension does not collect, upload, or share any of your conversation content or personal information. This project is open-source on GitHub, and the code is available for review at any time.

aboutDeveloperContent.message: This project is maintained by just me, with 1–2 new versions released every week. To report a bug or suggest a feature, reach out through any of the channels below (I will definitely reply when I see it):

aboutShareContent.message: If this extension has been helpful, Feel free to share it on X, Reddit, YouTube, etc., and with friends, classmates, or colleagues so more people can discover it. I maintain this plugin solo with limited energy and can't spare time for marketing — what I can do is keep making it better and better. Thank you so much. ❤️

aboutXhsTip.message: If you've posted a quality recommendation article or video on Xiaohongshu, I can help boost it with paid promotion (starting from ¥75). 👇
